L1_headline: SEM – New CEO appointed; leadership transition. | 09/02/25
L2_brief: Select Medical appointed Thomas P. Mullin as CEO effective September 1, 2025, replacing David S. Chernow who becomes Vice Chairman. This is a routine executive succession with no merger or deal implications; Mullin has 17 years with the company and previously served as Co-President.

L3_detailed.event: CEO succession: Thomas P. Mullin (41) appointed CEO effective September 1, 2025, replacing David S. Chernow (68) who transitions to Vice Chairman. John A. Saich becomes sole President.
key_figures: Restricted stock grants: 100,000 shares/year in 2024 and 2025 with 3-year cliff vesting
Mullin oversees 140 critical illness recovery and inpatient rehabilitation hospitals
L3_detailed.deal_implications: No merger or acquisition involved; this is an internal leadership succession unrelated to any pending transaction.
